findings.message: Screen "SignupScreen" contract looks happy-path-only. Missing baseline states: loading, empty, error.*.
findings.fix: Add loading, empty, error.* to requiredStates, or declare an exemption with a written reason if a state genuinely cannot apply.

findings.message: "Button.Secondary" on screen "SignupScreen" has contrast 2.43:1 (#9CA3AF on #F9FAFB) — below WCAG AA 4.5:1 for normal text.
findings.fix: Darken/lighten one side until the ratio reaches 4.5:1.

findings.message: Label "Create your free account" (signup.cta) is 24 chars; at ×1.4 localization expansion it projects to 34, over the layout budget of 22. German will break this.
findings.fix: Shorten the English source, or widen the layout budget to ≥ 34 chars.
